title: Nakkastepe Girls Student Guesthouse
content:
Nakkastepe Girls Student Guesthouse

By clicking on the headings below,

Nakkastepe Girls Student Guesthouse

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Üsküdar University Female Student Guest House is located 200 meters from the University and consists of 26 rooms and has a capacity of 71 students. Students can stay in double, triple, quadruple and quintuple rooms, and the rooms have a television and a desk for students to use. Our students have access to 24-hour internet connection in their rooms.

Valid from 01.07.2024 Monthly dormitory prices ;

Transportation by Metrobus

Transportation by Metrobus; It provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and crossing the road through the overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Kısıklı Street and turn to İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Street. 500m ahead is the Guest House.

Transportation by Ferry and Motorboat

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. From Üsküdar Square, get off at Bağlarbaşı-Altunizade with Kadıköy buses and minibuses. İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. 500 m after reaching the Guest House.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

D-100 - Arrival from Edirne/Topkapi Direction

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar -Kadıköy Turnoff (the second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the Student Guest House at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.

D-100 - Arrival from Ankara Direction

Before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge, take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar- Ümraniye. Continue left at the intersection. Continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the student guesthouse at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.

Arrival from TEM Highway

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the main road. After passing Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue on Kısıklı Street and reach the student guesthouse at İcadiye Bağlarbaşı Cd. Maruf Sk No: 63.

Our directional signs that can help you in and around Altunizade are hanging on the lampposts.
